title: SECONDARY USER UNDERCOVER COOPERATIVE DYNAMIC ACCESS PROTOCOL FOR OVERLAY COGNITIVE RADIO NETWORKS
author: A. Masri
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A secondary cooperative overlay dynamic spectrum access protocol in cognitive radio networks is proposed, allowing secondary users to access the primary system using full power without causing harmful interference to primary users. Moreover, an enhancement in the primary system will be achieved as a result of secondary relaying of primary messages. A detailed description of the protocol is given and illustrated with network scenarios.
steps_raw: A secondary cooperative overlay dynamic spectrum access protocol in cognitive radio networks is proposed, allowing secondary users to access the primary system using full power without causing harmful interference to primary users. A detailed description of the protocol is given and illustrated with network scenarios.
